title: What Stirred Up the Matter of al-Qadisiyyah
description: Al-Sari - Shucayb - Sayf - Muhammad b. `Abdallah b. Sawad b. Nuwayrah - `Aziz b. Miknaf al-Tamimi, then al- Usayyidi; 1052 Talhah b. al-A`lam al-Hanafi - al-Mughirah b. `Utaybah b. al-Nahhas 122o9] al `Ijli; and Ziyad b. Sarjis al-Ahmari-`Abd al- Rahman b. Sabot alAhmari: 1°53 The Persians said to Rustam and al -Fayruzan, who were in charge of the Persians,

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
